name: adrielfrederick-plugins
description: Plugins for automated review workflows and cross-repo context tooling.

plugins.name: review-plan
plugins.description: Automated plan review loop using parallel Claude reviewer agents.

plugins.name: pr-review-loop
plugins.description: Automated PR review loop using Codex reviewer agents. Requires the Codex CLI and gh.

plugins.name: context-setup
plugins.description: Bootstrap the vault-context client in any git repo — config, Stop hook, cross-platform scheduled task, gitignore, cold-start fetch.
